thread: The dead from Millhaven marched north toward Quel'Thalas

evidence.clue: The churn behind the houses shows many bodies moving away from the village rather than remaining buried or collapsed in place.
Mira says the lane was full and they all went north.
The cleaner spoor beyond Paret's shed and the road read confirm mass movement northbound in significant number.

readerKnows: The plague is no longer a stationary village problem; an organized-looking mass of dead has already moved toward the border line.
povCharacterKnows: Sylvanas has enough proof to warn Quel'Thalas but not enough to know whether the dead are self-organizing or being directed.
notes: Carry this thread into chapter 4 as strategic pressure. The dead are already ahead somewhere.
